phrases.zh: 你是我穷极一生到不了的天堂
phrases.text: You are the heaven I cannot reach tonight
I still keep longing for you

phrases.zh: 让我铺天盖地琢磨不停想象
phrases.text: You are the heaven I cannot reach
This unknown road
Stay with me
You are the heaven I cannot reach

phrases.zh: 你主动的退让我被动的撒谎
phrases.text: Every moment turns back to you
You are the heaven I cannot reach
Stay with me through the night
You are the heaven I cannot reach
Let my dreams cover the sky

phrases.zh: 我多想陪你一场也想你和我一样
phrases.text: You are the heaven I cannot reach tonight
Keeps calling me onward

phrases.zh: 你是我穷极一生到不了的天堂
phrases.text: You are the heaven I cannot reach tonight
Stay with me through the night

phrases.zh: 让我铺天盖地琢磨不停想象
phrases.text: You are the heaven I cannot reach
Stay with me through the night

phrases.zh: 我开始不管不顾不问这场疯狂
phrases.text: You are the heaven I cannot reach tonight

phrases.zh: 始终掩盖自己伪装你说爱有多荒唐
phrases.text: You are the heaven I cannot reach tonight

phrases.zh: 谁会在你的身旁却还是一个人流浪
phrases.text: You are the heaven I cannot reach tonight
I still dream of you
You are the heaven I cannot reach
Stay with me through the night

phrases.zh: 我多想陪你一场也想你和我一样
phrases.text: You are the heaven I cannot reach tonight
Stay with me through the night

phrases.zh: 你是我穷极一生到不了的天堂
phrases.text: You are the heaven I cannot reach tonight
Let my dreams cover the sky

phrases.zh: 让我铺天盖地琢磨不停想象
phrases.text: You are the heaven I cannot reach

phrases.zh: 这未知的疯狂我开始不管不顾
phrases.text: You are the heaven I cannot reach tonight
Stay with me through the night
Stay with me through the night

phrases.zh: 你说爱有多荒唐谁会在你的身旁
phrases.text: You are the heaven I cannot reach tonight

phrases.zh: 却还是一个人流浪和从前一样
phrases.text: You are the heaven I cannot reach tonight
